title: Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that achieves over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The model combines selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT's persistent GPU kernel runtime to optimize inference speed.
writeup: The video examines Xiaomi and TileRT's MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model that reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The focus is the inference stack behind that throughput: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT's persistent GPU kernel runtime. The takeaway is that the speed comes from combining sparse expert routing with quantization, speculative decoding, and a kernel runtime that keeps work resident on the GPU, rather than from a single technique.
